originalAlarm.description: Memory dynamically allocated by `malloc` on line 10 is not freed after the last access at line 11, column 7.

model:
(define-fun SSL_CTX_set_ecdh_auto () Bool
  true)
(define-fun HAVE_ECC () Bool
  true)
reasoning: MEMORY_LEAK: eckey allocated at L10 (HAVE_ECC=T) and never freed before return at L24. Same known VBDB bug as PRODUCT_30 (TRUE, PC=HAVE_ECC). The leak occurs whenever HAVE_ECC=T regardless of SSL_CTX_set_ecdh_auto — both branches lead to the same unfreed return. SSL_CTX=T is unnecessary. PC over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_OVER.
